title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, discusses scaling challenges at Shopify, the cyclical emergence of new database companies every 15 years, and the intersection of AI coding with database infrastructure. The conversation covers infrastructure engineering principles, the role of P99 engineers in the AI era, and the future trajectory of database technology.
